subject: fix(mobile): WCAG 2.5.5 touch targets, safe area handling, modal overflow
body:
- Add viewport-fit=cover to index.html for safe area inset support
- Add body safe area padding in index.css for notched devices
- Increase all button/input touch targets to min 44px (Hero, UpdatePrompt,
  InterestForm, InstallInstructionsModal, DebugBanner, Projects)
- Add safe area clearance to fixed elements (UpdatePrompt top banner,
  DebugBanner pill/panel, skip-to-content link)
- Add scrollable content area with max-h-[85vh] to InstallInstructionsModal
- Make iframe heights responsive (h-64/h-72 on mobile, scaling up via sm/md)

Tags: mobile, a11y, touch-targets, safe-area, wcag
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: mobile-ux
Semver: minor
